description: Canonical lane maturity registry. See feedback_production_hardened_standard_definition_20260430.md for the 7-gate Level 3 standard. Maintained via tools/lane_maturity.py — bare edits OK for seeding but mark/unmark/audit-log are the supported interface going forward.

gate_definitions.impl_complete: Production code lands; no NotImplementedError; all CLI flags wired; all error paths covered.
gate_definitions.real_archive_empirical: Real-archive empirical measurement on Lane G v3 anchor (or equivalent baseline). Tagged [empirical:<artifact>].
gate_definitions.contest_cuda: Actual [contest-CUDA] score from Vast.ai 4090 / Modal A100 / equivalent. NOT [contest-CPU advisory]. NEVER MPS.
gate_definitions.strict_preflight: STRICT preflight check covering the lane's bug class (or warn-only with documented STRICT promotion path).
gate_definitions.three_clean_review: 3-clean-pass adversarial review per CLAUDE.md Recursive adversarial review protocol. Counter at 3/3 with rotating perspectives, no new bugs.
gate_definitions.memory_entry: Memory file documenting empirical result + dispatch metadata + cross-refs.
gate_definitions.deploy_runbook: Deploy script + heartbeat + watchdog + harvest path documented (e.g. scripts/remote_lane_<id>.sh).

level_rules.3: ALL 7 gates satisfied — FULL PRODUCTION HARDENED + RECURSIVE ADVERSARIAL REVIEWED.

lanes.name: Lane Ω-W V3 (PoseNet-sensitivity weighting — pending Grand Council)
lanes.notes: Design pending Grand Council #294 verdict. Builds on Ω-W-V2 by weighting bit-budget by per-symbol PoseNet sensitivity (Hessian-aware). Council to decide weighting form.

lanes.name: Lane GP-PINT8 (forensic — fp16 → int8 cast, possible)
lanes.notes: Forensic in flight per BG agent #297. May implement if EV high. Lane PFP16 dominates currently — PINT8 adds ~3.5KB additional savings IF distortion holds at -1e-5 (Lane PFP16 was ZERO distortion).

lanes.name: Lane GP-PWavelet (forensic — wavelet pose codec)
lanes.notes: Forensic in flight per BG agent #297. May implement if EV high vs pure-fp16 baseline. Wavelet basis on 6-dim pose stream.

lanes.name: Lane GP-PBalle (forensic — Balle hyperprior on pose stream)
lanes.notes: Forensic in flight per BG agent #297. May implement. Balle scale-prior amortization on pose qint stream — but pose stream is only 600×6=3600 symbols; codec-overhead may dominate.

lanes.name: Lane GP-PPredictive (forensic — predictive-coding pose codec)
lanes.notes: Forensic in flight per BG agent #297. May implement. Predict pose[t] from pose[t-1..t-3], encode residual.

lanes.name: Overfit-known-video subagent (DUPLICATE→DOC)
lanes.notes: Subagent 2026-05-01 review: 5 prompt-suggested approaches (frame-idx NN / per-frame residual / Rust decoder / RL allocation / sensitivity-weighted truncation) all duplicate in-flight lanes (lane_j_nwc / lane_12_nerv_mask_codec / lane_owv3_0120 / lane_rl_pufferlib_bandit / lane_sensitivity_map). Council 7/0 NO-DISPATCH. Memo: .omx/research/overfit_known_video_strategy_20260501.md. $0 GPU spent. Reactivation: only if one of the duplicate lanes empirically falsifies that approach.

lanes.notes: FALSIFIED 2026-05-01: AMRC=1,082,649 vs AV1=421,483 (2.57x larger). Confirms prior project_amrc_negative_result.md (5d old). Reactivation criteria: future renderer trained against AMRC-faithful clean masks AND distortion improvement >0.4 to compensate +600KB rate hit.
